name: tng-purchasing-functions
description: Cloud Functions for TNG Purchasing System - Budget Control

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.test: npx tsx --test src/qr/orderLogic.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/rateLimit.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/createQrTable.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/createQrOrder.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/getPublicMenu.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/getQrOrder.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/postOfficialInvoice.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/listQrTables.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/getQrTableToken.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/releaseLogic.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/releaseOrder.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/xenditClient.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/createXenditSession.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/xenditWebhook.handler.test.ts src/qr/__tests__/updateQrOrderStatus.handler.test.ts
scripts.test:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-tng-qr "npx tsx --test src/qr/__tests__/rules.emulator.test.ts"
